target_or_observation: Staple seats airtight without wobble before bag pressure tests
method: dry fit reed in chanter seat; check wobble, insertion depth, and leak path
next_action: Record reed maker, strength, staple OD, seat depth, and leak result before tone-hole tuning.

target_or_observation: Low A speaks cleanly as pressure rises toward first playable threshold
method: manometer plus tuner; increase bag pressure slowly from no-sound to speaking
next_action: Log onset pressure, pitch, warble, and any chirp before changing holes or reed.

target_or_observation: Low A and scale notes remain stable across the planned 18-25 inH2O normal range
method: hold 18, 21, and 25 inH2O; record frequency and cents error for Low A plus representative scale notes
next_action: Use results to decide whether reed strength or hole tuning is the next variable.

target_or_observation: Reed overblow/cutoff threshold is above the chosen normal-play pressure
method: raise pressure past normal range only enough to identify cutoff or instability
next_action: Do not tune permanent holes until cutoff margin is known.

target_or_observation: Reference tenor starts and restarts predictably before duplicating the second tenor
method: cycle bag pressure down/up through onset; record start pressure, restart pressure, and bridle/screw setting
next_action: Validate one tenor reed and slide range before copying GHB-TENOR-2.

target_or_observation: Tenor drone holds A3 without sudden pitch jumps across the planned pressure range
method: record Hz/cents at 18, 21, and 25 inH2O with slide position and reed setting
next_action: Adjust reed first, then slide; do not cut wood to correct pressure instability.

target_or_observation: Bass drone starts below normal play pressure and remains stable through normal play
method: record onset, normal-play pitch, cutoff/choke pressure, slide position, and reed setting
next_action: Run after tenor reference passes; bass dimensions remain provisional until this row has evidence.

target_or_observation: Adding chanter to tuned drones does not collapse pressure, beat excessively, or force reed retuning
method: test drones alone, then drones plus chanter at the same manometer targets
next_action: Only promote coupled tuning claims after this full-set row has measured evidence.

target_or_observation: Bag, stocks, and blowpipe valve hold pressure well enough that reed results are meaningful
method: 60-second pressure decay test before reeds are installed; repeat after stocks and reeds are fitted
next_action: Fix leaks before interpreting any reed onset, cutoff, or tuning response.
